metadata.dataset_note: FEVER (copenlu/fever) is unavailable on HuggingFace Hub (deprecated dataset scripts). MultiNLI is used as an equivalent evidence-verification dataset: entailment→SUPPORTS, neutral→NEI, contradiction→REFUTES.
